meta.commit_message: Update platformdirs requirement from \~=4.5.0 to \~=4.10.0 \(#4321\) Updates the requirements on \[platformdirs\]\(https://github.com/tox-dev/platformdirs\) to permit the latest version. - \[Release notes\]\(https://github.com/tox-dev/platformdirs/releases\) - \[Changelog\]\(https://github.com/tox-dev/platformdirs/blob/main/docs/changelog.rst\) - \[Commits\]\(https://github.com/tox-dev/platformdirs/compare/4.5.0...4.10.0\) --- updated-dependencies: - dependency-name: platformdirs dependency-version: 4.10.0 dependency-type: direct:development ... Signed-off-by: dependabot\[bot\] \<support@github.com\> Co-authored-by: dependabot\[bot\] \<49699333+dependabot\[bot\]@users.noreply.github.com\>
